case_title: CHANG, BOK NAM VS MASIS, LUIS A. et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHANG, BOK NAM AS TO DEFENDANT MASIS, LUIS A. SUNSET SCAVENGERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MASIS, LUIS A. SUNSET SCAVENGERS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO LUIS MASIS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MICHAEL J. SANGIACOMO, AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR SUNSET SCAVENGER RETURNED UNDELIVERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, BOK NAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASIS, LUIS A. SUNSET SCAVENGERS $1,892.50 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,934.50, THE COURT DISMISSES THE ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANT LUIS A. MASIS, AN INDIVIDUAL, WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $6345 FOR PERSONAL INJURY AND $1225. FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE BUT ATTRIBUTES 75% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF FOR A NET DAMAGE OF $1892.50 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
